articles.title: Watch: 1,033 candidates in one election: Tamil Nadu’s craziest poll
articles.description: Today, voting in India is simple. You walk into a polling booth, press a button on an Electronic Voting Machine, and your vote is cast in seconds.  But in 1996, voters in one constituency in Tamil Nadu faced a very different situation. They had to search through a booklet running into more than 60 pages just to find the candidate they wanted to vote for. Because, that election had 1,033 candidates.

topStories.title: "A Bad Start For Him": Trump On Reports Of Mojtaba Khamenei Being Gay
topStories.description: A report in the New York Post had claimed that Donald Trump was "stunned" to learn that US intelligence indicated that Mojtaba Khamenei may be gay.

topStories.description: Announcement is the latest example of Trump literally stamping his name on US institutions.

topStories.title: Two Cuba-bound aid ships missing after leaving Mexico
topStories.description: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.

topStories.title: DHS shutdown breakthrough comes at cost for Republicans as funding fights nears end
topStories.description: The Senate advanced a DHS shutdown deal without ICE or CBP funding, as Republicans plan to use reconciliation to secure immigration enforcement funding long-term.

topStories.title: Rubio meets G7 ministers in France as US leads on Iran — allies under fire for tepid response
topStories.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio heads into the G7 foreign ministers meeting in France saying U.S. priorities come first, as European allies push for a diplomatic solution on Iran.

topStories.title: New Jersey middle school teacher charged with child sex assault after alleged sexual relationship with student
topStories.description: A former New Jersey middle school teacher faces multiple charges after allegedly engaging in a sexual relationship with a student in 2021.

topStories.title: Appeals court pauses orders limiting federal agents' use of tear gas at protests near Portland ICE building
topStories.description: An appeals court paused two lower court rulings that limited tear gas use on protesters outside the Immigration and Customs Enforcement building in Portland.

dailyNews.title: Indiana coach Cignetti sends message to star transfer with pre-practice dress code lesson
dailyNews.description: Indiana head coach Curt Cignetti said his staff has more work to do with its transfer class, noting he called out wide receiver Nick Marsh over gold shoes prior to spring practice.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iranian protesters being ‘shot by snipers,’ voices support for people under regime
dailyNews.description: President tells "The Five" the Iranian regime uses snipers to suppress protests, drawing a distinction between Iran's leadership and its people amid Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: Climate executive warns California ‘functionally bankrupt,’ $1T shortfall could shake nation
dailyNews.description: Climate entrepreneur David Friedberg warned California is “functionally bankrupt," citing pension liabilities, legal limits, and spending concerns in a recent interview.

dailyNews.title: United jet dodges Black Hawk in last-second maneuver over California airport: 'That was not good'
dailyNews.description: The FAA is investigating a close call between a United Airlines Boeing 737 and a Black Hawk helicopter at John Wayne Airport in Santa Ana, California.

dailyNews.title: DHS arrests 5 illegal immigrants convicted of violent crimes including manslaughter, child assault
dailyNews.description: ICE arrested five illegal immigrants convicted of manslaughter, child sexual assault, and carjacking, according to DHS Acting Assistant Secretary Lauren Bis.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises San Francisco mayor for 'trying very hard' to improve city after moderates took over leadership
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says San Francisco has tremendous potential and claims federal tools could solve the city's crime problems faster than local leadership can.

dailyNews.title: Former Eagles star Brent Celek’s ex-wife reveals relationship with another ex-Philadelphia player
dailyNews.description: Susie Celek, ex-wife of retired Eagles tight end Brent Celek, went public on social media with her relationship with former Philadelphia player Hollis Thomas.

dailyNews.title: State Department reveals world's most dangerous countries for Americans
dailyNews.description: Americans face risks of "arbitrary arrests" and kidnapping abroad amid State Department warnings for the Middle East, Mexico and Iran-linked threats.

dailyNews.title: Doctor’s bloodied wife seen in bodycam after screaming for help from husband’s alleged attack
dailyNews.description: Bodycam footage shown at an attempted murder trial in Maui captured Arielle Konig bloodied on a trail. Prosecutors allege her doctor husband attacked her.

dailyNews.title: Taylor Swift stuns at iHeartRadio Music Awards; Jason and Brittany Aldean turn heads during date night
dailyNews.description: Stars like Taylor Swift, Jason Aldean, Donnie Wahlberg and Jenny McCarthy lit up the 2026 iHeartRadio Music Awards red carpet at the Dolby Theater in style.

dailyNews.title: Newsom team mocks 'conservative snowflakes' after gay dating app insults spark homophobia claims
dailyNews.description: Critics accused Gov. Gavin Newsom's office of using Grindr references as a homophobic slur against conservative commentator Benny Johnson amid a California fraud dispute.

dailyNews.title: Trump speaks out on Iran's execution of 19-year-old wrestler Saleh Mohammadi
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump addressed Iran's reported execution of 19-year-old wrestler Saleh Mohammadi, saying he was killed for speaking against the regime.

topStories.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune, R-S.D., said bipartisan DHS shutdown talks are progressing after Republicans sent Democrats what he called a "last and final" funding offer.

topStories.title: President Trump insists MAGA 'loves' his war on Iran: 'MAGA people are smart'
topStories.description: President Donald Trump said the MAGA base supports his military campaign on Iran during an interview on "The Five," noting that supporters know he's protecting the United States.

topStories.title: Trump Says He Will Order T.S.A. Agents Paid as Funding Deal Stalls
topStories.description: President Trump’s announcement came as talks on Capitol Hill over funding the Department of Homeland Security faltered, and airport lines continued to grow.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Investigate Stanford, Ohio State and U.C. San Diego Medical Schools
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department’s demands for admissions-related data from Stanford, Ohio State and the University of California, San Diego, reveal an expansion of its higher-education pressure campaign.

dailyNews.title: What’s on Trump’s Mind During a Cabinet Meeting? Sharpies, Iran and Inflation.
dailyNews.description: President Trump waxed on about the virtues of the pen, calling it more economical and a better instrument than the fancier writing tools preferred by his predecessors.

dailyNews.title: Standoff With Iran Raises Fresh Doubts About Trump’s Freestyle Diplomacy
dailyNews.description: A jumble of emissaries — a friend, a family member, a dove and a hawk — on the Iran crisis reflects President Trump’s improvisational approach.

dailyNews.title: Stocks Are Mixed and Oil Dips After Trump Delays Threat to Bomb Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said on Thursday he would delay an imminent deadline to begin attacking Iran’s power grid.

dailyNews.title: Kennedy’s Vaccine Agenda Hits Roadblocks, Diminishing His Clout
dailyNews.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s vaccine skepticism is posing challenges for the Trump administration. Top health jobs are unfilled, and a court has blocked his vaccine schedule changes.

dailyNews.title: Trump Defends His Use of Mail-In Voting: ‘Because I’m President’
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to restrict voting by mail, which he says amounts to “cheating.” But he defended his own use of the practice in a special election this week.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff floats Iran peace plan as Trump extends pause on energy plant strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump has extended a pause on striking Iranian energy infrastructure until April 6.

dailyNews.title: Senate fails to advance DHS funding for 7th time, Trump promises to restart TSA pay
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he would sign an executive order to "immediately" pay TSA officers, who have gone without pay for more than a month.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon from labeling Anthropic AI a "supply chain risk"
dailyNews.description: A judge has blocked the Trump administration from labeling Anthropic a supply chain risk and cutting off all federal work with the artificial intelligence firm, an early win for Anthropic in its bitter feud with the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's granting Iran's request to extend pause on energy site strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced the extension of the pause "per Iranian government request."

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll order DHS to start paying TSA officers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he will sign an executive order to restart pay for TSA officers, who have gone more than a month without a full paycheck.

dailyNews.title: Trump extends pause on Iran energy sites, claims Iranians eager for peace deal
dailyNews.description: The U.S. will extend its pause on strikes on Iranian energy plants by roughly an additional 10 days, at the request of the Iranian government, President Trump announced. Ed O'Keefe has the latest.
